name: uioption
description: Inject design variants and inspect UI components on local dev pages — built for AI-assisted coding workflows
author: Muhammed Kılıç

scripts.package: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && VERSION=$(bun -p "require('./src/manifest.json').version") && cd src && zip -q -r "../dist/uioption-v$VERSION.zip" . -x '.*' && echo "dist/uioption-v$VERSION.zip hazır"
